rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to the owning component and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Assumptions and guarantees must be expressed using the syntax: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression;
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component implementation annexes are used for assignments and bindings valid in that scope
Constants and equations are declared with const name : type = value; and eq name : type = expression;
Assignments are written as assign output = expression;
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact AADL component, port, and data type names from the model index
Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
anti_patterns: Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent new ports/components not in the model
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
